# Capacity Planning

## Purpose
Use this skill to evaluate utilization trends, headroom, and scaling needs.

## Triggers
- "capacity risk"
- "scaling plan"
- "forecast traffic"

## Outputs
- Capacity risk summary
- Bottleneck components
- Forecast assumptions
- Scaling recommendations

## Example Prompts
- "Forecast traffic growth for 90 days and identify likely saturation points."
- "Which component will bottleneck first if QPS doubles during the launch?"
